articles.title: BNB falls below $885 as broader market pulls back and treasury tensions emerge

articles.title: Florida revives push for bitcoin reserve with new 2026 bill
articles.description: House Bill 1039 would let Florida invest in crypto outside its treasury, reviving a withdrawn proposal and signaling the GOP’s growing embrace of ‘digital gold.’

articles.title: Binance expands into precious metals with gold, silver futures settled in USDT

articles.title: Banks must upgrade their blockchain infrastructure
articles.description: Banks risk falling behind if they cling to private blockchains. Upgrading to public, permissioned layer-2 infrastructure with ZK-proofs is essential for modern finance.
